featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Journal entries management
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can create, edit, and delete journal entries with content.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Mood logging
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can log their daily mood up to 3 times per day.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Timeline view
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can view a timeline of their entries and moods.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: AI insights
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Paid users can generate AI-powered insights from their journal data.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Search functionality
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can search through their entries and tags.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: User authentication
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can sign up, log in, and manage their accounts.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Usage limits enforcement
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Free users are limited to 5 entries per day and 3 mood logs per day.

featuresNotYetImplemented.name: Payment integration
featuresNotYetImplemented.description: Users can pay for AI features through Stripe integration.

apiEndpointsToBuild.description: Create a new journal entry with content
Retrieve journal entries for the timeline view
Retrieve mood logs for the timeline view
Generate AI-powered insights from journal data

openQuestions: What is the data type and range for the mood field in MoodLog?
What payment tiers and pricing structure should be implemented for AI features?
How should the search functionality work - full-text search, tag-based, or both?
What specific AI insights should be generated and how should they be presented?
How should the timeline view display entries and moods - chronologically mixed or separated?
What user settings should be available on the settings page?
